description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a long, straight wooden handle with a natural grain pattern and a slightly rounded end for grip. The axe head is made of metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade that is stained with red, suggesting either paint or a simulated blood effect. The blade is single-edged, with a flat poll on the opposite side, and is securely mounted to the handle with a visible red collar or wedge at the joint. The handle appears smooth and polished, with no additional grip features or texturing. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks, and the coloration gives it a dramatic, possibly theatrical appearance.
description: A full-sized axe with a straight wooden handle and a broad, single-edged metal blade stained red. The blade is securely mounted with a red collar, and the handle is smooth and polished.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the broad, red-stained metal blade.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thin edge of the blade and the narrow profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the handle and the blade's red-stained surface.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded end of the handle and the back of the axe head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical wooden handle with a rounded end, smooth surface, and no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and a broad cutting edge, stained red.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with a visible red collar securing the blade to the handle.
